case_title: MARIA A. YOUNG VS. BRYAN SILLOREQUEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,324.00 FILED BY YOUNG, MARIA A. AS TO DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, MARIA A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-31-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, MARIA A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
